== Notes for [[Item:Q103532|Q103532]] ==

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45924

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=50611

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=51279

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45592

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000078037329608

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
